title: Enchants Plus: Descriptions & Translations
description: Adds descriptions and translations for enchantments added by Enchants Plus
body:
## Description
This resource pack adds descriptions and translations for enchantments added by [Enchants Plus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchants-plus) when using the [Idwtialsimmoedm](https://modrinth.com/mod/idwtialsimmoedm) or [enchantment descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions) mod. 

## Installation
- Go to pause menu > options > resource packs and click open pack folder. copy the zip to this folder, then go back to Minecraft and move the pack from available (left) to selected (right).
- additionally, if you would like enchantment descriptions, install a description mod such as [Idwtialsimmoedm](https://modrinth.com/mod/idwtialsimmoedm) or [enchantment descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions)

## Credits
| Language     | Translator                   |
|--------------|------------------------------|
| English      | -                            |
| Russian      | `@xeller`                    |
| German       | `@craftingmeister8`          |

## Other things to note

- English descriptions are also available when using the listed description mods!
- If you would like to contribute, message me on discord at `@__peepo`!
